# Copilot Instructions for skill-maker

This file is the lightweight Copilot bootstrap for this repo. For the full repo-wide guidance, read `AGENTS.md`. Don't add to this file; add new instructions to `AGENTS.md` and link to them from the relevant section below. The goal of this file is to provide a quick reference for Copilot suggestions while editing files in the repo, without overwhelming it with the full context of `AGENTS.md`.
